description: You must output ONE of the following two structural states based on the context validation.

oneOf.description: State 1: SUCCESS. Use this when all objects exist and a routine can be safely constructed.

recipe_name.description: Short, descriptive title of the routine

description.description: Brief text explanation of what this specific step does

parameters.description: Arguments specific to the chosen action. If 'home': {}. If 'move_arm': {'target': string (must match an Available Object)}. If 'relative_move': {'vector': 'move_upwards' | 'move_downwards' | 'move_left' | 'move_right'}. If 'gripper': {'position': float between 0.0 and 1.0}.

oneOf.description: State 2: ERROR. Use this if an object is missing, ambiguous, or the command violates workspace constraints.

message.description: Detailed natural language explanation of why the command failed execution.
